title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at IRCTC Tourism

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at IRCTC Tourism
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IRCTC Tourism:
IRCTC Tourism is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Tourism!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
